text:
CROOKER MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) Notwithstanding Section 225.001 (Restrictions on Naming Highway) (c), the portion of U.S. Highway 87 under construction as of September 1, 2015, as a relief route around Big Spring, between Interstate Highway 20 and Ranch Road 33, in Howard County is designated as the William B. Crooker Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the William B. Crooker Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(36), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.110 — William B

CROOKER MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) Notwithstanding Section 225.001 (Restrictions on Naming Highway) (c), the portion of U.S. Highway 87 under construction as of September 1, 2015, as a relief route around Big Spring, between Interstate Highway 20 and Ranch Road 33, in Howard County is designated as the William B. Crooker Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the William B. Crooker Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(36), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 16 (S.B.489), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*
